prompt: I'm translating an R tutorial page on the R-Ladies site into Portuguese. What should I do with the code chunks - the comments, function names, and variable names?
assertions: Says to translate comments inside code blocks
Says to keep function names and R keywords (function, if, library, etc.) in English
Says variable names may be translated only where it aids understanding
Notes the code must still run after translation
Emphasizes translating meaning/intent rather than literally
